<@UJN1TAYEQ> I actually got it running first try, it is a LÖVE application (<http://love2d.org>). After installing it just takes a `love .` to run

**EDIT:** nvm, still missing 'inspect' and 'posix', im trying luarocks..
interesting, i had some issues building with inotify.
the lua inotify rock didn't seem to work
Thanks <@UNGNT3BKR>, I'll try that.

so apparently you have to have the rust language installed, then get the luarocks-build-rust adaptor:
`luarocks install luarocks-build-rust`
and then you can have luarocks install all the dependencies with:
`luarocks --lua-version 5.1 --local make`

after this `./userland` should run it.

If it complains about not finding `inspect` throw in an extra `luarocks --lua-version 5.1 --local install inspect`
sent a PR with these instructions in a README: <https://github.com/hishamhm/userland/pull/1/files?short_path=04c6e90#diff-04c6e90faac2675aa89e2176d2eec7d8>
